_meta.description: TLG work ids (GLAUx-stem format AUTHOR-WORK) of every work the Gorman treebanks annotate. Gorman is the held-out gold corpus: no shipped artifact may derive from its trees, and annotations produced by Gorman-trained models (e.g. OGA) are excluded for these works to keep eval/eval_gorman_gold.py honest. Union of GLAUx metadata TREEBANK_ANNOTATIONS=Gorman stems and document_id URNs in the Gorman XML files.
